title: SlotDef
description: A single fill-in slot in a block or template. Structure only: a slot names a value the engine fills at render time and declares its type and PII relationship. A slot MUST NOT carry an example value or any real content.

name.description: Slot token as it appears in the Jinja2 body (e.g. the identifier between {{ }}). Snake_case identifier; carries no value.

slot_type.description: The kind of value the slot carries. Drives quasi-identifier detection in mining and validation in the engine.

required.description: Whether the engine must have a value for this slot before the document is considered complete.

pii_class.description: How this slot relates to PII in the source corpus. See the pii_parametrized / pii_residual conventions in README.md.

enum.description: Allowed values, used only when slot_type == 'enum'. Each value is a structural token, not content.

description.description: Human hint for the slot. MUST NOT contain example content, real values, or firm-specific text.

allOf.$comment: If slot_type is 'enum', an enum list should be provided.
